display_name: Setup tension and introduce the political stakes.

field_values.scene_title: Setup tension and introduce the political stakes.
field_values.action_summary: Returning to the plaza, Carter observes Dejah Thoris held captive under guard by Sarkoja. He uses his unique ability to understand the Martian tongue to eavesdrop on the council meeting led by Lorquas Ptomel.
field_values.camera_intent: Over-the-shoulder shots (Carter's POV); medium shots of the guards; wide shots of the council assembly.
movement_notes: Carter's hiding spot/positioning relative to the Council members.
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC002

- chapter_id: `CH010`
- scene_title: `Setup tension and introduce the political stakes.`

## Production Intent

Setup tension and introduce the political stakes.

## Storyboard

Returning to the plaza, Carter observes Dejah Thoris held captive under guard by Sarkoja. He uses his unique ability to understand the Martian tongue to eavesdrop on the council meeting led by Lorquas Ptomel.
